strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js across multiple roles
Strong background in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, aligning with emerging tech requirements
Proven track record of optimizing performance, scalability, and user experience in enterprise environments
concerns: Limited explicit experience with Kotlin/Java for backend services (secondary stack requirement)
No direct mention of Vitest testing framework (primary stack requirement)
Resume lacks detail on cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) and Kubernetes experience
response.justification: Aisha demonstrates strong full-stack development skills with TypeScript and Node.js, and has relevant experience in AI-agent infrastructure. However, gaps in cloud platform and Kubernetes experience, as well as the absence of Vitest from her listed testing frameworks, slightly reduce her alignment with the primary stack requirements. Her extensive background in scalable systems and user-centric development suggests strong potential.
